hero.title: 亚洲人工智能学院
hero.subtitle: 为专业人士提供智能体AI、算法交易和网络安全能力培训。

certified.heading: 课程由官方认证讲师设计和教授

mission.statement: Metaskills Institute 为我们的社区提供知识、技能和经验，以
mission.highlight1: 应对未来的人工智能挑战
mission.highlight2: 推动东盟的数字化转型。
mission.pillar1Desc: 为初级专业人士到高级管理人员提供智能体AI、数据科学和算法交易领域的高影响力课程组合。
mission.pillar2Desc: 我们的师资将真实世界的咨询和部署经验——结合超过十年的大学级别教学——带入每一间教室。
mission.pillar3Desc: 每个课程都融合了技术深度、战略思维和与企业及政府标准对齐的实施框架。

programmes.title: 我们的课程
programmes.subtitle: 找到适合您的课程。
programmes.agenticDesc: 为现实企业应用设计、部署和治理自主AI智能体。
programmes.aiAutoDesc: 从无代码工作流到AI编码智能体——构建和部署智能自动化系统的实用动手工作坊。
programmes.dataDesc: 从Python编程到高级机器学习——实用的、基于项目的数据科学教育。
programmes.fintechDesc: 由自动化和分析驱动的数据化交易策略。
programmes.cyberDesc: 全面的网络安全概述——基础知识、威胁格局、关键角色和认证路线图规划。
programmes.aiLeadDesc: 面向高层领导者的战略工作坊——AI采用路线图、问责框架、智能体治理和AI兵棋推演。
programmes.mccDesc: 整合的网络安全认证课程——4天核心基础加1天选修课，对齐Security+、CySA+、CEH、CHFI和SecAI。

why.title: 为何选择 Metaskills
why.intro: 我们的培训师是活跃的AI顾问和部署专家。这种行业沉浸意味着每节课都基于当今重要的实际挑战和机遇。
why.feat1Desc: 我们的讲师是活跃的AI顾问和部署专家，与企业、政府机构和大学合作。
why.feat2Desc: 由拥有超过十年大学级别教学和企业培训经验的资深培训师指导。
why.feat3Desc: 与行业和政府合作设计的认证——在新加坡和东盟得到认可。
why.feat4Desc: 我们将复杂的AI概念简化为实际步骤，使各级学习者都能理解。
why.feat5Desc: 我们的师资已在新加坡和东盟培训了超过10,000名专业人士。
why.feat6Desc: 通过校友活动和行业合作连接新加坡不断增长的AI和数字创新生态系统。

faculty.title: 我们的核心师资
faculty.subtitle: 已培训超过10,000名专业人士的实践者、研究者和教育者。

testimonials.title: 学员反馈
testimonials.quote1: 完成课程后两个月内，我使用智能体AI工作流自动化了30%的报告任务。培训师的实际咨询经验使培训立即可应用。
testimonials.quote2: Metaskills为我们的经理设计了定制的AI技能提升课程。除了培训外，他们还与我们合作确定AI可以提供切实商业价值的试点项目。
testimonials.quote3: 该课程为我们提供了一个清晰的框架，用于评估智能体AI机会，同时平衡治理和合规性。很少有培训师能如此有效地将战略与技术知识联系起来。

locations.title: 我们的学习空间
locations.subtitle: 为沉浸式动手学习体验而设计的世界级设施。
locations.hqDesc: 位于114 Lavender Street, CT Hub 2, #07-74, Singapore 338729。我们的主校区配备了先进的AI实训设施。
locations.trainingDesc: 为沉浸式、基于项目的课程设计的现代协作学习空间。
locations.labDesc: 专用于AI研究、原型设计和行业合作的空间。
locations.confDesc: 配备演示显示器和白板的全功能会议室，用于战略会议和企业研讨会。

admissions.title: 招生
admissions.subtitle: 加入前瞻性专业人士社区。我们的课程专为寻求建立现实世界AI能力的个人和组织设计。
admissions.benefit1: 智能体AI和应用数据科学的行业认可认证
admissions.benefit2: 由资深培训师设计的实用、基于项目的课程
admissions.benefit3: 接入新加坡不断增长的AI和数字创新生态系统
admissions.benefit4: 校友活动和行业合作机会
admissions.benefit5: 由在大学和政府机构任教的师资认可的课程
admissions.benefit6: 提供英语、中文和越南语版本
admissions.feesDesc: 我们的课程费用免征消费税。我们提供自费和企业费率。详细价格请参考各课程页面或联系我们的招生团队。
admissions.cancellation: 取消政策：开课30天前：全额退款减去SGD 900处理费。30天内：不退款。允许在课程开始前3天进行替换。

footer.tagline: 东盟在智能体AI、算法交易和网络安全能力建设方面的首选合作伙伴。

aboutPage.heroSubtitle: 东盟在智能体AI、算法交易和网络安全能力建设方面的首选合作伙伴。
aboutPage.missionP1: Metaskills Institute 是一家新一代培训和咨询机构，处于智能体AI、算法交易和网络安全的前沿。我们为组织和专业人士提供在自主、AI驱动经济中运营所需的能力——在这个经济中，智能体做出决策，网络韧性决定存亡，金融市场由算法塑造。
aboutPage.missionP2: 我们超越理论。我们的课程整合了技术深度、战略思维和与企业标准对齐的实施框架。我们的资深培训师——许多在本地大学和机构拥有超过十年教学经验——设计方向和课程。这确保每位讲师都能提供植根于实际咨询和部署项目的价值。
aboutPage.visionP1: Metaskills Institute 是亚洲首屈一指的数字科学学院，由数字科学和转型领域最受尊敬和最有热情的从业者和领导者组成，其中许多人拥有博士学位。
aboutPage.visionP2: 我们的热情是支持个人在数据科学、人工智能、机器学习、Web技术等高需求工作领域实现数字技能精通。凭借超过8年的数据驱动策略定制实施实践经验，我们的师资和顾问开发了高标准且与现有和未来行业相关的培训课程和认证标准。
aboutPage.pillar1Desc: 为现实企业应用设计、部署和治理自主AI智能体。
aboutPage.pillar2Desc: 由自动化和分析驱动的数据化交易策略。
aboutPage.pillar3Desc: 保护数字基础设施、保障AI系统安全，并构建合规就绪的架构。
aboutPage.pillar4Desc: 受到新加坡和东盟企业、大学和政府机构的信赖，是能力建设的首选合作伙伴。
aboutPage.langDesc: 我们的课程提供英语、中文和越南语版本——覆盖新加坡和更广泛东盟地区的专业人士和组织。

facultyPage.heroSubtitle: 课程背后的实践者、研究者和教育者。
facultyPage.intro: 我们的师资已培训超过10,000名专业人士，并在知名大学教授数据科学。所有培训师都经过精心挑选，以简化复杂概念而著称。

clientsPage.workedWithDesc: 面向各组织层级提供培训、咨询、产品开发和大师班。

clientsPage.ctaDesc: 准备好提升团队技能了吗？联系我们获取为您的组织量身定制的培训解决方案。

agenticFoundations.title: 智能体AI工作流基础
agenticFoundations.tagline: 探索AI驱动系统的基础知识，以转变决策流程。
agenticFoundations.whyAttend: In today's fast-paced environment, understanding how to harness AI-driven workflows is essential. This introductory workshop equips you with the core concepts and practical tools to implement agentic systems that streamline and enhance decision-making.
agenticFoundations.courseDesign: This two-day workshop provides a comprehensive introduction to agentic AI workflows. Participants will learn about the fundamentals of AI agents, explore common tools used to build these systems, and engage in hands-on exercises that simulate real-world applications.
agenticFoundations.objective1: Understand the core principles and components of agentic AI systems.
agenticFoundations.objective2: Identify common tools and platforms used in developing AI workflows.
agenticFoundations.objective3: Explore real-world applications and operational scenarios.
agenticFoundations.objective4: Gain hands-on experience by building basic AI agentic workflows.
agenticFoundations.objective5: Develop an operational mindset for integrating AI into decision-making processes.

agenticUseCase.title: 利用大语言模型赋能智能体AI与用例开发
agenticUseCase.tagline: 利用语言模型的力量创建动态、自主的智能体系统。
agenticUseCase.whyAttend: This workshop focuses on integrating large language models (LLMs) into agentic AI frameworks, enabling participants to design and implement systems that act as autonomous agents.
agenticUseCase.courseDesign: This two-day workshop dives into the intermediate realm of agentic AI. Through lectures and practical exercises, the course covers building AI agents capable of initiating actions, making decisions, and evolving based on feedback.
agenticUseCase.objective1: Deepen your understanding of agentic AI and autonomous decision-making systems.
agenticUseCase.objective2: Learn to integrate LLMs into agentic workflows to enhance system autonomy.
agenticUseCase.objective3: Develop practical skills in coding, API integration, and prompt engineering.
agenticUseCase.objective4: Explore real-world scenarios where agentic AI transforms operational processes.
agenticUseCase.objective5: Design and present tailored AI use cases leveraging agentic systems.

agenticDeploy.title: 部署和保护高级智能体AI系统
agenticDeploy.tagline: 掌握在安全、可扩展环境中部署自主AI智能体。
agenticDeploy.whyAttend: Deploying agentic AI systems in secure, reliable environments is critical for high-stakes operations. This advanced workshop is tailored for professionals ready to transition from development to robust, production-level deployment.
agenticDeploy.courseDesign: This two-day workshop concentrates on advanced deployment and operationalization of agentic AI systems, with emphasis on on-premise deployment strategies, security protocols, and scalability.
agenticDeploy.objective1: Understand the unique challenges of deploying autonomous agentic AI systems.
agenticDeploy.objective2: Gain insights into secure deployment practices and on-premise integration.
agenticDeploy.objective3: Learn advanced troubleshooting and integration techniques.
agenticDeploy.objective4: Develop strategies for scaling agentic AI systems with strict security.
agenticDeploy.objective5: Apply knowledge in hands-on simulation labs.

pythonDataAnalytics.title: Python数据分析编程
pythonDataAnalytics.tagline: Python编程 | 机器学习 | 数据分析
pythonDataAnalytics.whyAttend: Taught by Leading Singaporean Data Scientists working on existing Data Science and A.I Projects with MNCs and Government Bodies. This programme is uniquely designed by industry leaders in Data Science, AI, Machine Learning and Deep Learning.
pythonDataAnalytics.courseDesign: Conducted over 2 blocks — each block covers 2 weekday evenings (7 pm to 10.30 pm) and a full Saturday (9 am to 6 pm). Total training hours: 30 hours.
pythonDataAnalytics.objective1: Learn essential Python programming techniques for data analysis.
pythonDataAnalytics.objective2: Learn essential data wrangling techniques – import, inspect, clean, merge, and transform data.
pythonDataAnalytics.objective3: Learn how to present data and insights with visualizations.
pythonDataAnalytics.objective4: Apply all the learned techniques on real-world datasets and use-cases.
pythonDataAnalytics.afterCompleting1: Perform essential Data Analyst techniques using Python
pythonDataAnalytics.afterCompleting2: Make better and informed business decisions using data
pythonDataAnalytics.afterCompleting4: Analyse data on processes and generate recommendations
pythonDataAnalytics.afterCompleting5: Present findings with appropriate visualization techniques

certifiedDataAnalyst.title: 认证数据分析师 — JCube学院
certifiedDataAnalyst.tagline: 为职业发展设计的行业认可数据分析师认证。
certifiedDataAnalyst.whyAttend: The Certified Data Analyst programme equips you with the analytical skills and tools needed to extract insights from complex datasets. This certification is recognised across Singapore and ASEAN.
certifiedDataAnalyst.courseDesign: A comprehensive programme combining theoretical foundations with hands-on projects using real-world datasets.
certifiedDataAnalyst.objective1: Master data wrangling, cleaning, and transformation techniques.
certifiedDataAnalyst.objective2: Build proficiency in statistical analysis and hypothesis testing.
certifiedDataAnalyst.objective3: Create compelling data visualizations and dashboards.
certifiedDataAnalyst.objective4: Apply machine learning fundamentals to real-world business problems.
certifiedDataAnalyst.objective5: Earn an industry-recognised certification from JCube Institute.

certifiedDataScientist.title: 认证数据科学家 — JCube学院
certifiedDataScientist.tagline: 为寻求精通的专业人士设计的高级数据科学认证。
certifiedDataScientist.whyAttend: The Certified Data Scientist programme takes your skills to the next level with advanced machine learning, deep learning, and AI techniques.
certifiedDataScientist.courseDesign: An intensive programme combining advanced theoretical concepts with industry-grade projects.
certifiedDataScientist.objective1: Build and deploy advanced machine learning and deep learning models.
certifiedDataScientist.objective2: Master feature engineering and model optimization techniques.
certifiedDataScientist.objective4: Work with unstructured data including text, images, and time series.
certifiedDataScientist.objective5: Earn an industry-recognised Data Scientist certification.

algoTradingL1.title: 非专业人士金融市场算法交易精通 — 第1级
algoTradingL1.category: 金融科技 / 算法交易
algoTradingL1.tagline: 迈出在万亿美元外汇、黄金和加密货币市场成为成功交易者的第一步。
algoTradingL1.whyAttend:
Most top tier investors do not reveal their investment secrets but after profiting sufficiently through shrewd investment strategies over the years, our experts have decided to unlock their knowledge and skills to a wider community so that more can benefit from the exciting new market that has emerged with technology advances.

This course has been designed to teach you the essentials of trading on the world's most popular trading platform, Meta Trader 4 (MT4) and auto-trade the strategies or algorithm that you are comfortable with and learn to manage your risk to generate consistent income.

Algorithmic trading, also called 'Auto Trading' or 'System Trading,' uses electronic platforms such as MetaTrader 4/5 to enter trading orders with an algorithm. The main benefit of algorithmic trading is that it does not make decisions based on emotions. It can also help you take more trades, as you're not limited by your ability to sit at the computer and enter orders manually. It is essential to note that there are risks associated but all these can be mitigated and taught hands on in this unique course. Start making passive and sustainable income now!
algoTradingL1.courseDesign: Full Hands-On with Coaching Outside Classes. Classes are all On-Site at our CT Hub premises. Class sizes are capped to enhance students' learning experience. 3 evenings (7 pm to 10 pm), 9 hours total.
algoTradingL1.objective1: Any aspiring trader who is just starting out and who wants to kickstart their financial trading journey to begin earning passive income using trading robots.
algoTradingL1.objective2: Anyone who wants to learn about Expert Advisors using MT4's largest online store of trading robots, technical indicators, panels, libraries, analyzers in MT4.
algoTradingL1.objective3: No prior trading experience is required. This MetaTrader course is designed for traders who are just starting out, or for those who have never used MetaTrader 4.
algoTradingL1.whatYouLearn2: Market profile of forex, gold and crypto markets on MT4 trading platform
algoTradingL1.whatYouLearn4: Power of leverage, compounding and concept of expected payout
algoTradingL1.whatYouLearn5: Financial mechanics of trading on MT4 platform
algoTradingL1.whatYouLearn7: Different timeframes and related trading styles
algoTradingL1.whatYouLearn8: Opportune timing, Favourable Factors and Right Frame of Mind trading framework
algoTradingL1.whatYouLearn9: Best trading hours and trading range
algoTradingL1.whatYouLearn10: Setup trading environment for high success rates with indicators, templates and settings
algoTradingL1.whatYouLearn11: How to make consistent income with just USD$300
algoTradingL1.whatYouLearn13: Auto trading or trading with Expert Advisors
algoTradingL1.whatYouLearn14: Free resources to find new tools, trading strategies, expert advisors and indicators
algoTradingL1.whatYouLearn15: Trading with funds from others – proprietary trading company
algoTradingL1.scheduleDay1Item2: Market profile of forex, gold and crypto
algoTradingL1.scheduleDay2Item1: Financial mechanics of trading on MT4
algoTradingL1.scheduleDay2Item4: Trading framework and best trading hours
algoTradingL1.scheduleDay3Item1: Setup trading environment for high success rates

algoTradingL2.title: 非专业人士金融市场算法交易精通 — 第2级
algoTradingL2.category: 金融科技 / 算法交易
algoTradingL2.tagline: 高级算法交易策略，包括回测、优化和专有EA。
algoTradingL2.whyAttend:
Building on Level 1, this advanced programme takes you deeper into the world of algorithmic trading. Most top tier investors do not reveal their investment secrets but after profiting sufficiently through shrewd investment strategies over the years, our experts have decided to unlock their knowledge and skills to a wider community.

This course has been designed to teach you the essentials of trading on the world's most popular trading platform, Meta Trader 4 (MT4) and auto-trade the strategies or algorithm that you are comfortable with and learn to manage your risk to generate consistent income.

Participants who have completed the course will be eligible to participate in a Metaskills Institute competition with $100 for top prize and $50 x 2 for consolation prizes.
algoTradingL2.courseDesign: Jointly offered with JCube Institute (On-Site Classes). Classes are all On-Site at our CT Hub premises. Class sizes are capped to enhance students' learning experience. 3 evenings (7 pm to 10 pm), 9 hours total.
algoTradingL2.objective1: Any aspiring trader who wants to advance their algorithmic trading skills beyond Level 1.
algoTradingL2.objective2: Anyone who wants to learn advanced Expert Advisor strategies, backtesting, and optimization.
algoTradingL2.objective3: Pre-requisite: Participants are required to complete Algorithmic Trading Mastery Level 1.
algoTradingL2.whatYouLearn1: Backtesting – learn how to examine the effectiveness of trading strategies
algoTradingL2.whatYouLearn2: Optimize on parameters of each strategy
algoTradingL2.whatYouLearn3: Get the ten most profitable EAs in the market and setup in your VPS
algoTradingL2.whatYouLearn4: Common strategies adopted by EAs developers
algoTradingL2.whatYouLearn5: Working knowledge of setting up VPS to optimize trading performance
algoTradingL2.whatYouLearn6: 2 free EAs developed by trainer: FXV-Avalanche and FXV-Z-Scalper
algoTradingL2.whatYouLearn7: Proprietary Trading Companies and pass their assessment for funding your trading career
algoTradingL2.scheduleDay2Item1: Top 10 most profitable EAs in the market
algoTradingL2.scheduleDay2Item2: Common strategies adopted by EA developers
algoTradingL2.scheduleDay2Item3: VPS setup for optimal trading performance
algoTradingL2.scheduleDay3Item1: Proprietary trading companies and funding assessment
algoTradingL2.scheduleDay3Item2: Free proprietary EAs: FXV-Avalanche and FXV-Z-Scalper

riseAiAgents.title: 2026年AI智能体崛起：用智能AI系统实现全面自动化
riseAiAgents.tagline: 全面介绍AI自动化和自主智能体的世界。
riseAiAgents.whyAttend: This course maps the current landscape: what AI agents are, how they differ from traditional automation, what no-code and low-code platforms exist, how organisations are deploying agents for scheduling, reporting, knowledge management, and decision support, and what the emerging trends are (multi-agent systems, personal AI assistants, agentic security).
riseAiAgents.courseDesign: A one-day workshop with live demonstrations, hands-on exercises, and a guided learning path assessment.
riseAiAgents.objective1: Understand what AI agents are and how they differ from traditional automation.
riseAiAgents.objective2: Explore no-code and low-code AI platforms.
riseAiAgents.objective3: See live demonstrations of leading agent platforms.
riseAiAgents.objective4: Build a simple automated workflow hands-on.
riseAiAgents.objective5: Map out which courses match your role and goals.

buildAiNoCode.title: 零代码构建AI工作流（2026版）
buildAiNoCode.tagline: 使用可视化自动化创建智能体AI工作流——无需编程。
buildAiNoCode.whyAttend: Learn to create agentic AI workflows using n8n visual automation platform. Create workflows by connecting nodes, integrating APIs, and embedding AI agent nodes — all with drag-and-drop.
buildAiNoCode.courseDesign: A one-day hands-on workshop using the n8n visual automation platform.
buildAiNoCode.objective1: Build workflows using n8n visual automation platform.
buildAiNoCode.objective2: Connect nodes, integrate APIs, and embed AI agent nodes.
buildAiNoCode.objective3: Test, debug, and deploy functional workflows.

designAiPlainLang.title: 用自然语言设计AI自动化（2026版）
designAiPlainLang.tagline: 使用大语言模型从自然语言描述生成AI工作流。
designAiPlainLang.whyAttend: Describe desired automation in plain language, generate workflow configurations via AI, validate outputs, and iteratively refine until production-ready.
designAiPlainLang.courseDesign: A one-day workshop focused on natural language-driven workflow generation.
designAiPlainLang.objective1: Use LLMs to generate n8n workflows from natural language.
designAiPlainLang.objective2: Describe automations in plain language and validate AI-generated outputs.

buildOpTools.title: 用AI编码智能体构建运营工具（2026版）
buildOpTools.tagline: 使用结构化五层AI编码方法构建生产级工具。
buildOpTools.whyAttend: Build operationally relevant tools (data pipelines, report generators, dashboards) using AI coding agents. Follow a structured five-layer approach: define the goal, provide organisational context, set boundaries, write clear instructions, and capture lessons.
buildOpTools.courseDesign: A one-day hands-on workshop building real operational tools with AI coding agents.
buildOpTools.objective1: Build data pipelines, report generators, and dashboards with AI agents.
buildOpTools.objective2: Follow a structured five-layer approach for reliable output.
buildOpTools.objective3: Move beyond trial-and-error to production-quality AI coding.
buildOpTools.objective4: Provide organisational context to AI coding agents.
buildOpTools.objective5: Capture and apply lessons for continuous improvement.

buildAiAssistant.title: 构建你的专属AI助手/智能体（2026版）
buildAiAssistant.tagline: 在普通硬件上安装、配置和定制个人AI智能体。
buildAiAssistant.whyAttend: Hands-on introduction to lightweight, open-source personal AI agent frameworks (nanobot, zeroclaw, picoclaw). Install, configure, and customise a personal AI agent. Covers messaging integration, custom skills, and security risk management.
buildAiAssistant.courseDesign: A one-day hands-on workshop building and deploying personal AI agents.
buildAiAssistant.objective1: Work with open-source AI agent frameworks.
buildAiAssistant.objective2: Install and configure personal AI agents on modest hardware.
buildAiAssistant.objective3: Integrate messaging platforms and custom skills.
buildAiAssistant.objective4: Manage security risks for personal AI agents.
buildAiAssistant.objective5: Customise agent behaviour for your specific needs.

gptKnowledgeBase.title: 如何用GPT构建组织知识库（2026版）
gptKnowledgeBase.tagline: 从组织文档构建可搜索的AI知识系统。
gptKnowledgeBase.whyAttend: Build searchable AI knowledge systems from unit documents (SOPs, policies, after-action reviews). Upload, structure, and index content with NotebookLM and Gemini. Focus on context engineering, chunking strategies, and operational knowledge retrieval that reduces hallucination.
gptKnowledgeBase.courseDesign: A one-day workshop focused on building AI knowledge management systems.
gptKnowledgeBase.objective1: Build AI knowledge systems from organisational documents.
gptKnowledgeBase.objective2: Upload, structure, and index content with NotebookLM and Gemini.
gptKnowledgeBase.objective3: Apply context engineering and chunking strategies.
gptKnowledgeBase.objective4: Reduce hallucination through proper knowledge retrieval.

secureAgenticInfra.title: 保护智能体AI基础设施：威胁、防御与治理（2026版）
secureAgenticInfra.tagline: 智能体AI系统的安全与治理——从威胁到政策。
secureAgenticInfra.whyAttend: Covers prompt injection, data exfiltration, permission escalation, and unintended autonomous actions. Includes a red-team exercise against a sample workflow and drafting a governance policy.
secureAgenticInfra.courseDesign: A one-day workshop combining threat analysis, red-team exercises, and governance policy development.
secureAgenticInfra.objective1: Identify key threats to agentic AI systems.
secureAgenticInfra.objective2: Understand prompt injection, data exfiltration, and permission escalation.
secureAgenticInfra.objective3: Conduct red-team exercises against sample workflows.
secureAgenticInfra.objective4: Draft governance policies for AI agent deployment.
secureAgenticInfra.objective5: Implement defence strategies for autonomous systems.

aiTrainingDesign.title: 使用AI进行培训设计和课程开发（2026版）
aiTrainingDesign.tagline: 面向L&D专业人员——使用AI创建课程计划、评分标准和课程材料。
aiTrainingDesign.whyAttend: For L&D professionals and training officers. Use Gemini and NotebookLM to create lesson plans, outlines, rubrics, and custom Gems. Source-grounded research and content synthesis for curriculum materials.
aiTrainingDesign.courseDesign: A one-day workshop for L&D professionals on AI-powered training design.
aiTrainingDesign.objective1: Use Gemini and NotebookLM for curriculum development.
aiTrainingDesign.objective2: Create lesson plans, outlines, and rubrics with AI.
aiTrainingDesign.objective3: Build custom Gems for training applications.
aiTrainingDesign.objective4: Conduct source-grounded research and content synthesis.

buildAiTutors.title: 构建适应学生学习路径的强大AI导师（2026版）
buildAiTutors.tagline: 为组织构建定制AI导师和自适应学习路径。
buildAiTutors.whyAttend: For L&D professionals. Build custom AI tutors and adaptive learning pathways using Gems, NotebookLM, and chatbot prototyping tools. Covers on-premise vs. cloud deployment, security, and scaling strategies.
buildAiTutors.courseDesign: A one-day workshop for L&D professionals on building adaptive AI tutors.
buildAiTutors.objective1: Build custom AI tutors with adaptive learning pathways.
buildAiTutors.objective2: Use Gems, NotebookLM, and chatbot prototyping tools.
buildAiTutors.objective3: Evaluate on-premise vs. cloud deployment options.
buildAiTutors.objective4: Implement security measures for learning AI systems.
buildAiTutors.objective5: Scale AI tutors for organisational learning environments.

cyberRolesThreats.title: 网络安全：角色、威胁与认证路径
cyberRolesThreats.tagline: 全面的网络安全概述——基础知识、角色、威胁和认证路线图。
cyberRolesThreats.whyAttend: Covers fundamentals (CIA triad, zero trust, risk management), the current threat landscape, key roles (SOC analyst, pen tester, forensic investigator, AI security specialist), and major certification pathways (Security+, CySA+, SecAI, CEH, CHFI). Participants build a personalised 12 to 24 month certification roadmap.
cyberRolesThreats.courseDesign: A one-day comprehensive workshop covering cybersecurity fundamentals, career roles, and certification planning.
cyberRolesThreats.objective1: Understand cybersecurity fundamentals including CIA triad and zero trust.
cyberRolesThreats.objective3: Explore key cybersecurity roles and career paths.
cyberRolesThreats.objective4: Map major certification pathways (Security+, CySA+, CEH, CHFI).
cyberRolesThreats.objective5: Build a personalised 12–24 month certification roadmap.

aiStrategyLeaders.title: 领导者的AI战略与路线图
aiStrategyLeaders.tagline: 面向高级领导者的战略工作坊，评估AI潜力并制定采用计划。
aiStrategyLeaders.whyAttend: The morning covers AI fundamentals in plain language — what AI can and cannot do, how generative AI works, real defence and government use cases, and ethical risks leaders must manage. The afternoon is a hands-on strategy exercise: teams identify a real challenge, assess whether AI can help, and develop a practical roadmap with milestones, resource requirements, and risk mitigations.
aiStrategyLeaders.courseDesign: A one-day strategy workshop combining AI fundamentals with hands-on roadmap development. No technical background required.
aiStrategyLeaders.objective1: Understand AI fundamentals in plain language.
aiStrategyLeaders.objective2: Evaluate real defence and government AI use cases.
aiStrategyLeaders.objective3: Identify challenges where AI can provide value.
aiStrategyLeaders.objective4: Develop a practical AI adoption roadmap.
aiStrategyLeaders.objective5: Manage ethical risks and resource requirements.

aiAccountability.title: AI做决定时谁负责？
aiAccountability.tagline: 正面解决AI驱动决策的问责问题。
aiAccountability.whyAttend: When an AI system processes a procurement request, triages maintenance tickets, or drafts operational communications, who is responsible if something goes wrong? This workshop tackles accountability through realistic scenarios. Learn to separate decisions that must stay with humans from tasks AI can handle, and design oversight models that work at operational speed.
aiAccountability.courseDesign: A one-day workshop with realistic scenarios and group exercises designing accountability models. No technical background required.
aiAccountability.objective1: Separate human-accountable decisions from AI-delegable tasks.
aiAccountability.objective2: Design oversight models that work at operational speed.
aiAccountability.objective3: Identify where human judgment remains irreplaceable.
aiAccountability.objective4: Build an accountability model for your unit's AI use.

governingAiAgents.title: 治理AI智能体：信任、边界与审计追踪
governingAiAgents.tagline: 为AI智能体设定边界，追踪每项操作至人类授权。
governingAiAgents.whyAttend: Learn to set clear boundaries for what an AI agent may and may not do (spending limits, data access, communication permissions, time windows), assign levels of autonomy based on risk and mission criticality, and trace any AI action back through a chain of authority.
governingAiAgents.courseDesign: A one-day workshop on AI agent governance with boundary design exercises. No technical background required.
governingAiAgents.objective1: Set clear boundaries for AI agent permissions and autonomy.
governingAiAgents.objective2: Assign autonomy levels based on risk and mission criticality.
governingAiAgents.objective3: Build audit trails tracing AI actions to human authority.
governingAiAgents.objective4: Design boundary frameworks for realistic agent scenarios.
governingAiAgents.objective5: Handle situations when agents exceed their authority.

aiWargaming.title: AI兵棋推演：在决策生效前测试
aiWargaming.tagline: AI工具作为分析顾问的实战兵棋推演演习。
aiWargaming.whyAttend: Teams construct a strategic scenario, then use AI to generate options, challenge assumptions, and simulate adversarial responses at each decision point. The exercise integrates governance: before the game begins, teams define what the AI advisor is and is not allowed to do, and after the game, they evaluate whether the AI stayed within bounds.
aiWargaming.courseDesign: A one-day hands-on wargaming exercise combining AI decision-making with governance evaluation. No technical background required.
aiWargaming.objective1: Use AI tools as analytical advisors in wargaming exercises.
aiWargaming.objective2: Construct strategic scenarios and generate AI-driven options.
aiWargaming.objective3: Challenge assumptions and simulate adversarial responses.
aiWargaming.objective4: Define and enforce AI advisor guardrails.
aiWargaming.objective5: Evaluate AI behaviour against governance boundaries.

mccFoundation.title: MSI CyberCore+（MCC+）网络防御基础
mccFoundation.tagline: 4天密集基础课程，涵盖所有主要网络安全认证的核心知识。
mccFoundation.whyAttend: A 4-day intensive foundation that covers the core knowledge shared across all major cybersecurity certifications: threat landscape, network security, system hardening, incident response, and risk management. After completing MCC+, participants only need 1 additional day per certification elective instead of 4–5 days each.
mccFoundation.courseDesign: A 4-day intensive programme consolidating shared cybersecurity foundations aligned to CompTIA and EC-Council domains.
mccFoundation.objective1: Master core cybersecurity knowledge across all major certifications.
mccFoundation.objective2: Understand threat landscape, network security, and system hardening.
mccFoundation.objective3: Learn incident response and risk management fundamentals.
mccFoundation.objective4: Prepare for Security+, CySA+, CEH, and CHFI certifications.
mccFoundation.objective5: Save training time with consolidated foundational programme.

mccSecurityOps.title: MCC+ 安全运营（对齐CompTIA Security+）
mccSecurityOps.whyAttend: Builds on the MCC+ foundation to cover security architecture, IAM, network monitoring, and operational controls specific to the Security+ examination. Requires MCC+ completion.
mccSecurityOps.courseDesign: Intensive 1-day elective building on MCC+ foundation. Requires MCC+ completion.
mccSecurityOps.objective3: Implement network monitoring and operational controls.
mccSecurityOps.objective5: Apply security operations concepts in practice.

mccThreatHunting.title: MCC+ 威胁追踪与蓝队（对齐CompTIA CySA+）
mccThreatHunting.whyAttend: Builds on the MCC+ foundation to cover threat detection, log analysis, behavioural analytics, and SOC workflows for identifying advanced threats. Requires MCC+ completion.
mccThreatHunting.courseDesign: Intensive 1-day elective building on MCC+ foundation. Requires MCC+ completion.
mccThreatHunting.objective1: Master threat detection and log analysis.
mccThreatHunting.objective2: Apply behavioural analytics for threat hunting.
mccThreatHunting.objective3: Implement SOC workflows for advanced threat identification.

mccOffensiveCyber.title: MCC+ 进攻性网络基础（对齐EC-Council CEH）
mccOffensiveCyber.whyAttend: Builds on the MCC+ foundation to cover ethical hacking methodology: reconnaissance, scanning, enumeration, vulnerability assessment, and basic exploitation techniques. Requires MCC+ completion.
mccOffensiveCyber.courseDesign: Intensive 1-day elective building on MCC+ foundation. Requires MCC+ completion.

mccDigitalForensics.title: MCC+ 数字取证与事件调查（对齐EC-Council CHFI）
mccDigitalForensics.whyAttend: Builds on the MCC+ foundation to cover digital evidence collection, forensic investigation, chain-of-custody documentation, and incident reconstruction. Requires MCC+ completion.
mccDigitalForensics.courseDesign: Intensive 1-day elective building on MCC+ foundation. Requires MCC+ completion.

mccAiSecurity.title: MCC+ AI安全与自主防御（对齐CompTIA SecAI）
mccAiSecurity.whyAttend: Builds on the MCC+ foundation to cover AI-specific threats (adversarial attacks, data poisoning, model theft), AI security lifecycle, and defence strategies for autonomous AI systems. Requires MCC+ completion.
mccAiSecurity.courseDesign: Intensive 1-day elective building on MCC+ foundation. Requires MCC+ completion.
mccAiSecurity.objective1: Understand AI-specific threats including adversarial attacks and data poisoning.
mccAiSecurity.objective3: Implement defence strategies for autonomous AI systems.
mccAiSecurity.objective4: Address model theft and AI supply chain risks.
